name: Hyper
long_description: Hyper is the company brain that "just works" for AI-first teams. Hyper silently learns from every update in every tool your team uses -- Notion docs, Claude Code questions, emails, LinkedIn DMs, Cursor sessions, etc. Our agent-driven algorithms update and clean all that information into real-time knowledge that is shared across your entire team. That knowledge is quietly infused into all your existing AI tools on every chat turn, so your whole company gets smarter permanently.
